name: Velo CRM
description: Outbound-native CRM for high-velocity sales teams — contacts, deals, pipelines, email sequences, Gmail sync, automations, lead scoring, reports, and a public REST API. React + TypeScript frontend backed by a Node.js API and Supabase.

VITE_API_URL.label: Velo API URL — full URL of the velo-api backend (e.g. https://api.velo.example.com)

VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.label: Google OAuth Client ID — required for Gmail and Calendar integration (leave empty to disable)

VITE_SENTRY_DSN.label: Sentry DSN for error tracking (optional — leave empty to disable)

post_install.description: The app connects to an external Supabase project and velo-api backend. Make sure both are running and their URLs are set in the environment variables before opening the app. On first visit, register your organisation at /register.
